data.title: Riot Platforms To Raise $525 Million Via Private Convertible Debt To Purchase Bitcoins
data.description: Bitcoin mining company Riot Platforms, Inc (NASDAQ: RIOT) priced $525M convertible senior notes due 2030, with option for additional $75M. Upsized from $500M, closes 12/11/24.

data.title: Oracle Analysts Boost Their Forecasts After Q2 Results
Why Is uniQure Stock Skyrocketing On Tuesday?
data.description: uniQure stock surges after FDA agrees on an accelerated approval pathway for its Huntington's disease treatment, AMT-130.

data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Macy's Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
data.description: Macy's offers an annual dividend yield of 4.16%. To earn $500 monthly, start with the yearly target of $6,000 ($500 x 12 months).
